hero.subtitle: PRICING
hero.title: Simple, transparent pricing
hero.body: Choose the plan that fits your company. Scale up modules as you grow.

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.desc: For small service companies getting started with digital tools.

tiers.name: Professional
tiers.desc: For growing companies that need the full operational toolkit.

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.desc: For established companies needing full customization and scale.

comparison.title: Module comparison
comparison.body: See exactly what's included in each plan.

items.question: How does billing work?
items.answer: We bill monthly or annually. Annual billing comes with a discount. You can switch plans or cancel at any time with 30 days notice.

items.question: How long does onboarding take?
items.answer: Most companies are up and running within a week. We help you import existing data (employees, clients) and configure the modules you need. Larger setups with full accounting migration may take 2-3 weeks.

items.question: Where is my data stored?
items.answer: All data is hosted in the EU on secure, GDPR-compliant infrastructure. Each tenant's data is fully isolated in its own database schema.

items.question: Can I add modules later?
items.answer: Absolutely. The platform is fully modular. Start with what you need and enable additional modules as your business grows. No data migration needed — everything is already connected.

items.question: Is Danish tax/payroll compliance included?
items.answer: Yes. eIndkomst reporting to SKAT, Danish holiday law calculations, ATP/pension, and e-Faktura support are built in. We keep the platform updated with regulatory changes.

items.question: Do you offer a free trial?
items.answer: We offer a guided demo followed by a trial period so you can evaluate the platform with your own data. Contact us to get started.

testimonial.quote: [Testimonial about value — e.g. 'We were paying for Planday + Billy + Salary.dk separately. DFMG replaced all three and saved us X kr/month while giving us features none of them had.']
testimonial.name: [Name]

cta.title: Not sure which plan?
cta.body: Book a call and we'll walk you through the right fit for your company — based on what you actually need, not what we want to sell.

hero.subtitle: PRISER
hero.title: Enkel, gennemsigtig prissaetning
hero.body: Vaelg den plan, der passer til jeres virksomhed. Skaler moduler op, efterhanden som I vokser.

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.desc: Til mindre servicevirksomheder, der vil i gang med digitale vaerktojer.

tiers.name: Professional
tiers.desc: Til virksomheder i vaekst, der har brug for det fulde driftsvaerktoej.

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.desc: Til etablerede virksomheder med behov for fuld tilpasning og skalering.

comparison.title: Modulsammenligning
comparison.body: Se praecis hvad der er inkluderet i hver plan.

items.question: Hvordan fungerer faktureringen?
items.answer: Vi fakturerer manedligt eller arligt. Arlig betaling giver rabat. I kan skifte plan eller opsige nar som helst med 30 dages varsel.

items.question: Hvor lang tid tager onboarding?
items.answer: De fleste virksomheder er oppe at kore inden for en uge. Vi hjaelper med at importere eksisterende data (medarbejdere, kunder) og konfigurere de moduler, I har brug for. Storre opsaetninger med fuld regnskabsmigrering kan tage 2-3 uger.

items.question: Hvor opbevares mine data?
items.answer: Alle data hostes i EU pa sikker, GDPR-kompatibel infrastruktur. Hver lejers data er fuldt isoleret i sit eget databaseskema.

items.question: Kan jeg tilfoeje moduler senere?
items.answer: Helt sikkert. Platformen er fuldt modulaer. Start med det I har brug for, og aktiver yderligere moduler efterhanden som jeres forretning vokser. Ingen datamigrering nodvendig — alt er allerede forbundet.

items.question: Er dansk skatte-/loncompliance inkluderet?
items.answer: Ja. eIndkomst-indberetning til SKAT, dansk ferielovsberegning, ATP/pension og e-Faktura-understottelse er indbygget. Vi holder platformen opdateret med lovgivningsaendringer.

items.question: Tilbyder I en gratis proveperiode?
items.answer: Vi tilbyder en guidet demo efterfulgt af en proveperiode, sa I kan evaluere platformen med jeres egne data. Kontakt os for at komme i gang.

testimonial.quote: [Udtalelse om vaerdi — f.eks. 'Vi betalte for Planday + Billy + Salary.dk hver for sig. DFMG erstattede alle tre og sparede os X kr/md, samtidig med at vi fik funktioner, ingen af dem havde.']
testimonial.name: [Navn]

cta.title: Ikke sikker pa hvilken plan?
cta.body: Book et opkald, sa gennemgar vi den rette losning til jeres virksomhed — baseret pa hvad I faktisk har brug for, ikke hvad vi gerne vil saelge.
